rationale: Gov't Code §2166.004 governs exceptions to a procurement chapter for public authority and state-aided local projects; it is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote:
In addition to the exceptions provided by Section 2166.003, this chapter does not apply to:
(1) a project constructed by or under the supervision of a public authority created by the laws of this state; or
(2) a state-aided local government project.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed change; rule concerns government construction project procurement exceptions, not property tax homestead exemptions.
